creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Naram Qashat from comment #3)
Naram, the best thing would be for the requester of this PR to mark this bug as "depends on" bug 201365 so that there is an open PR documenting the build failure with the current version until the port gets updated.  Once bug 201365 is closed this PR can be marked fixed.
